categories.label: Agent
categories.description: Named autonomous or semi-autonomous execution identities (SOVEREIGN, EXECUTOR, PRISM, etc.). May have YAML definition, slash command, Python implementation, and/or deployment target — not all layers required.

categories.label: Skill
categories.description: Reusable capability modules with SKILL.md. Located in Personal/skills/ and/or ~/.claude/skills/. May be registered (referenced by agent YAML or capability-matrix) or orphaned.
categories.industry_standard_primary: SFIA (Skills Framework for the Information Age)

categories.label: Workflow
categories.description: Named execution patterns in control_tower/workflows/. May be top-level YAML declarations (agent-dispatched) or subdirectory workflows with Python implementations.

categories.label: Service (MCP Server / Deployed Runtime)
categories.description: Deployed runtime services — MCP servers, bots, Cloud Run services, any process that runs independently and exposes an interface.

categories.label: Data Store
categories.description: Persistent storage systems — Supabase Postgres tables/views, Qdrant vector collections, SQLite databases. Each distinct table, view, or collection is a component.

categories.label: Enforcement Layer
categories.description: Database triggers, constraints, application-level enforcement scripts that form the 8-layer computational enforcement architecture.

categories.label: MCP Connector
categories.description: Client-side MCP connections configured in Claude Web, CLI, or Desktop. Distinct from services — connectors are the consumer configuration, services are the provider runtime.

categories.label: Hook
categories.description: Claude Code hooks — scripts triggered by session lifecycle events (SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.). Scoped to global (~/.claude/settings.json) or project (.claude/settings.json).

categories.label: Script
categories.description: Standalone utility scripts that are NOT hooks, NOT CLI wrappers, NOT daemons. Build tools, validators, reconcilers, manifest generators.

categories.label: CLI Wrapper / CLI Package
categories.description: Pip-installable agent CLI entry points (lore cli.py, sage cli.py, etc.) and standalone cli_anything_*.py wrappers. The execution interface layer through which agents and skills are invoked from the terminal.

categories.label: Schema
categories.description: Versioned data schemas that define the shape of BRIEFs, agents, checkpoints, retrospectives, skills, workflows.

categories.label: Configuration
categories.description: Settings files, env files, launchd plists, system_config DB rows, .cursorrules, Claude project instructions — anything that parameterizes system behaviour without being executable code.

categories.label: Credential Reference
categories.description: Documentation of credential existence, scope, and access patterns. NOT the credentials themselves. API keys, OAuth tokens, service accounts — documented as references to node contracts.

categories.label: Node Contract
categories.description: Architecture contract documents that define how a specific node (Claude Web, CLI, Cursor, MCP server) behaves, what tools it has, what permissions apply, and what failure modes exist.

categories.label: Scheduler / Daemon
categories.description: Crontab entries, macOS LaunchAgent plists, GCP Cloud Scheduler jobs, and Python daemons (executor_daemon, planner_daemon, brief_queue, close_loop_verifier). Runtime orchestration that determines when and how agents run.

categories.label: Repository
categories.description: Git repositories as first-class architectural units. Each repo has its own stack, tests, deployment pipeline, and CLAUDE.md. The deployable unit boundary.
